channel.title: Recent & Upcoming Talks on Soyoung Choi
channel.description: Recent content in Recent & Upcoming Talks on Soyoung Choi

item.title: 34th CSUN Assistive Technology Conference
item.description: The biggest assistive technology conference all over the world.

item.title: ENRS 31st Annual Scientific Sessions
item.description: Soyoung’s “Heart Failure Research Using Text Mining: A Systematic Review” study will be presented on Thursday Afternoon, April 4, 2018 from 3:30 pm-4:30 pm.

item.title: Nursing Theory: A 50 Year Perspective, Past and Future
item.description: Soyoung’s concept analysis of caregiver burden in palliative care was presented in Nursing Theory Conference (Thursday, March 21 & Friday, March 22, 2019).
